rationale: Re-assert both ensures-foralls so z3 has matching triggers, then chain the determining equalities: r1.0 = r2.0 = pre_self_@[0] forces r1.1 = r2.1 = pre_self_.get_node_ref(r1.0) and thus r1 == r2; both post views equal pre_self_@.skip(1) so they're equal by transitivity (sealed with =~=), after which a per-element `assert forall ... by` lifts get_node_ref agreement to the common view.
